zh.of Tamworth Castle, Tamworth, Staffordsh: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯

zh.Weoley, Northfield, Worcestershire, Engl: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾諾費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Baldwin Freville III於大約1368年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾諾費爾德時，他的父親Baldwin de Freville21歲，母親Joyce Botetourt22歲。他於1388年與Lady Johan de Grene在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯結婚。他去世於1400年10月4日在英國瓦維其可爾享年33歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Baldwin Freville III于大约1368年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾諾費爾德时，他的父亲Baldwin de Freville21岁，母亲Joyce Botetourt22岁。他于1388年与Lady Johan de Grene在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯结婚。他去世于1400年10月4日在英国瓦維其可爾享年33岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Freville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Préville): habitational name from (La) Préville, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Previl
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a shortened form of French Préville (see Preville ).
ornamental name composed of French pré ‘meadow’ and a shortened form of ville ‘settlement’ (see Vil ).

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Baldwin Freville III was born about 1368, in Northfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Baldwin de Freville, was 21 and his mother, Joyce Botetourt, was 22. He married Lady Johan de Grene in 1388, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England. He died on 4 October 1400, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Baldwin Freville III est né environ 1368, à Northfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Baldwin de Freville, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joyce Botetourt, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Johan de Grene en 1388, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1400, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Baldwin Freville III um 1368 in Northfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baldwin de Freville 21 und seine Mutter Joyce Botetourt 22. Er hat 1388 in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England Lady Johan de Grene geheiratet. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1400 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Warwickshire, England und wurde in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Baldwin Freville III è nato il circa 1368 nel Northfield, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Baldwin de Freville, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Joyce Botetourt, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Johan de Grene nel 1388, nel Tamworth, Staffordshire, England. Morì il 4 ottobre 1400, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Baldwin Freville IIIが約1368年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアノースフィールドで生まれた時，父Baldwin de Frevilleは21歳，母Joyce Botetourtは22歳であった。1388年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスでLady Johan de Greneと結婚した。彼は1400年10月4日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで33歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Baldwin Freville III(이)가 대략 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 노르스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baldwin de Freville(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce Botetourt(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1388년 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 Lady Johan de Grene(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1400년 10월 4일 영국 워윅실르에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Baldwin Freville III nasceu aproximadamente 1368, em Northfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Baldwin de Freville, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Botetourt, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Johan de Grene em 1388, em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1400, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Baldwin Freville III родился около 1368 г. в местности нортфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Baldwin de Freville было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joyce Botetourt, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Johan de Grene в 1388 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия. Он умер 4 октября 1400 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Baldwin Freville III nació aproximadamente 1368, en Northfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Baldwin de Freville, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joyce Botetourt, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Johan de Grene en 1388, en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1400, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
